FOLLOWUP REPORT. CORRECTION FOR EVENT TIME. PARK OFFICIALS REPORT NUMEROUS TREES DOWN, INCLUDING TREES ON OCCUPIED CABINS, CARS, AND THE GIFT SHOP. ALL GUESTS ACCOUNTED FOR. NUMEROUS MINOR INJURIES, NONE REQUIRING MEDICAL TREATMENT. ROAD TO PARK OPEN TO ONE LANE.

NUMEROUS LARGE TREES WERE SNAPPED AND UPROOTED WITH ONE OF THE TREES FALLING ON A PARK RANGERS CABIN.
